pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh parsing logic.
Downloaded NCBI NM_000207.3, extracted 'insulin A chain' mat_peptide (327..389) and translated to AA.
Downloaded NCBI NM_000207.3, extracted 'insulin B chain' mat_peptide (132..221) and translated to AA.
Extracted 'insulin A chain' mat_peptide from NCBI NM_000207.3 (position 327 to 389, length = 63 bp).
Extracted 'insulin B chain' mat_peptide from NCBI NM_000207.3 (position 132 to 221, length = 90 bp).

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for ugene_env insulin_mature_chain_extraction task by verifying real human insulin sequence data from NCBI GenBank (NM_000207.3). Confirmed exactly 3 'mat_peptide' features exist: the first is 'insulin B chain' (90 bp / 30 AA), and the final is 'insulin A chain' (63 bp / 21 AA). The extracted target nucleotide lengths and exact amino acid sequences explicitly match the instructions and verifier logic.
